summary: Verified fiscal invoice fix - NCF type inference from NCF string working correctly. All 10 backend tests passed. The fix allows bills with ncf_type=None to correctly display DATOS DEL CLIENTE section when NCF starts with B01/B14/B15.
passed_tests: GET /api/print/receipt/{bill_id} - returns HTML with DATOS DEL CLIENTE when fiscal data present and NCF is B01
GET /api/print/receipt/{bill_id} - omits DATOS DEL CLIENTE when no fiscal data
GET /api/print/receipt-escpos/{bill_id} - returns ESC/POS lines with DATOS DEL CLIENTE
NCF type inference B01 from NCF string B0100000190 working
Pay bill endpoint accepts fiscal_id, fiscal_id_type, razon_social fields
Bill fiscal data persistence verified (fiscal_id: 131062822, razon_social: SSTECH SRL)
FIX VERIFIED: Fiscal data displayed even when ncf_type=None for bill b86c3ebc-1f54-4e8d-81c8-52d297498c65
critical_code_review_comments: Fix correctly implemented at server.py lines 1213-1222 and 1283-1290
NCF type inference logic: B01/B14/B15 inferred from NCF string prefix when ncf_type is empty/None
Fiscal data section only shown for fiscal invoice types (B01, B14, B15) when fiscal_id or razon_social exists

bug_verified_fixed.bug_description: Customer fiscal data (RNC/Cédula and Razón Social) was not appearing on printed receipts for fiscal transactions (B01, B14, B15)
bug_verified_fixed.root_cause: Code checked ncf_type field which was None/empty for existing bills
bug_verified_fixed.fix_implemented: Infer ncf_type from NCF string prefix (e.g., B0100000190 -> B01) when ncf_type field is not set

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test bill
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fiscal invoice fix verified. The endpoints /api/print/receipt/{bill_id} and /api/print/receipt-escpos/{bill_id} now correctly infer NCF type from NCF string when ncf_type field is None. Test bill b86c3ebc-1f54-4e8d-81c8-52d297498c65 can be used for regression testing.

rca_of_the_issue.description: The print functions checked ncf_type field to determine if fiscal data should be shown, but older bills (pre-fix) had ncf_type=None even for B01 fiscal invoices. The fix infers the type from the NCF string prefix.
reproduction_steps: 1. Have a bill with NCF starting with B01 (e.g., B0100000190)
2. The bill has fiscal_id and razon_social populated
3. The bill has ncf_type=None (older bill or bug in save)
5. BEFORE FIX: DATOS DEL CLIENTE section missing
6. AFTER FIX: DATOS DEL CLIENTE section correctly displayed
rca_of_the_issue.fix_code:
if not ncf_type and ncf_str:
    if ncf_str.startswith('B01'): ncf_type = 'B01'
    elif ncf_str.startswith('B14'): ncf_type = 'B14'
    elif ncf_str.startswith('B15'): ncf_type = 'B15'
